title: GRUNDIG Solar Fairy Lights - Garden Light 8 LED Lanterns - 12 Lumen - LED with Flame Effect - Includes Solar Panel - Battery Life 8-6 Hours - Black
features: Solar light chain – this solar light chain is the perfect garden lighting to make a perfect summer evening even more comfortable. The light chain consists of 8 individual LED lanterns.
Includes solar panel – the LED light chain includes a solar panel that you can plug near the ground. During the day, this solar panel catches the sun's rays to operate the fairy lights.
8 lanterns with flame effect – thanks to the warm light emitted from the lanterns, a realistic flame effect is created, which gives the light chain even more atmosphere.
description: Create atmosphere and cosiness in the garden with this solar fairy lights from Grundig. The 2 metre long LED light chain consists of 8 individual LED lanterns, each containing its own light source. The warm light of the lanterns creates a realistic flame effect, which gives the fairy lights even more atmosphere. The LED fairy lights come with a solar panel that you can insert into the ground. During the day, this solar panel catches the sun's rays and charges the solar fairy lights. Fully charged, the LED garden light has a battery life of 6 to 8 hours. Hang the solar fairy lights over the dining table at a cosy family barbecue or use them as a mood light at a summer gathering. Specifications GrundigSolar fairy lights. Brand: Grundig LED: 12 lumens. Works with solar energy Length of the fairy lights: 2 m. Battery life fully charged: 6-8 hours. Solar panel material: polycrystalline Distance between light sources: 20 cm. Diameter of bulbs: 6 cm.
